title: Mediterranean Paella with Fish
description: A flavorful and nutritious Mediterranean-inspired paella dish with fish as the main protein, perfect for a light dinner.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large paella pan or skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and sauté for 3-4 minutes, until softened.
Add the minced garlic and sauté for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the diced bell pepper and sauté for 2-3 minutes, until tender.
Add the fish pieces and cook for 2-3 minutes, until lightly browned.
Add the Mediterranean rice mix, canned tomatoes, artichoke hearts, and feta cheese (if using).
Stir to combine, then add 2 cups of water.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes, or until the rice is tender and the liquid has been absorbed.
Remove from heat and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
